since_last: 38% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.97%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.36% · BTC -1.77% · Gold -1.60% · Nasdaq100 -0.02%. 38% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.97%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.97%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.39%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.39%, ANET +6.96%, AVGO +5.13%, BIDU +4.96%, AMBA +4.78%. Laggards: PANW -5.11%, UPST -4.93%, ZS -4.02%, WDAY -3.97%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.97% at $146.52
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.97% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
